sections.paragraph:
verb לקרון

to radiate, beam, shine

verb להקרין

to radiate; project (on a screen)

verb הוקרן

be radiated; be projected (on a screen)

feminine noun

horn, antlers, bugle

feminine noun קרנים (>>קרניים)

horn, antlers, bugle

masculine noun

horn (music)

feminine noun

fund, capital, foundation, principal, purse, kitty

feminine noun

corner

feminine noun

ray, beamm, shaft

feminine noun קרנים (>>קרניים)

ray, beamm, shaft

feminine noun

strength, prestige, power, glory, might
